name: codex-usage-tracker
description: Track aggregate Codex token usage from local session logs.

interface.shortDescription: Local aggregate token usage analytics for Codex
interface.longDescription: Read local Codex session logs, aggregate exact token usage counters, and generate summaries, CSV exports, and a hoverable dashboard without storing raw chat text.
defaultPrompt: Show my Codex token usage summary
Export my Codex token usage CSV
